markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and next steps for GrowthX's publication project, including design, development, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Design direction for the publication is progressing well, with a unique color palette and layout approved](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [Development will likely use Next.js or Astro, with a custom CMS (possibly Strapi or Statomic) for flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Content strategy includes articles, videos, and potentially AI-generated content with visible prompts](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [First video and article are coming soon, focusing on AI SEO and LLM tracking for brand mentions](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

## Topics

### Design Progress

  - [Webflow templates for graphics were sent and will be shared with Webflow team](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Current design direction approved: unique color palette, not typical black/white, allows graphics to "breathe"](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Inspiration from Sequoia's blog, with customizable text placement on listing pages](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Goal: stand out visually while keeping content as the focus](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### Development Considerations

  - [Ed (developer) recommends Next.js or Astro for the tech stack](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Custom CMS needed for flexibility; considering Statomic or potentially Strapi (GrowthX customer)](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Aiming for high customizability between posts, similar to Sequoia's blog](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Will include features like gated content (e.g., latest article for subscribers only)](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [First video coming soon: chat with AI SEO experts on LLM tracking for brand mentions](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Companion written guide to accompany video, diving deeper into concepts](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Considering AI-generated content with visible prompts (inspired by Sequoia's "Inference" substack)](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Videos will be hosted on YouTube and embedded in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Branding and Naming

  - [Leaning towards keeping "Yelp" as the publication name](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Jason to discuss further branding details with Ren](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to send a Loom video aligning team on design direction](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Ed to start scaffolding the website based on approved design](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Team to decide on CMS (Ed to explore Strapi as an option)](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Jason to provide a sample post for Ed to mock up a detailed page layout](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [Jason to follow up on GrowthX email access for Ed](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Team to finalize first video and article content](https://fathom.video/share/SztxQJ6HX4ZAeShPE7t7QeVGxdwomwwQ?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
